mapper.select: SELECT id AS orderItemId, order_id AS orderId, sku_id AS skuId, warehouse_id AS warehouseId, quantity AS quantity, unit_price AS unitPrice, amount AS amount, create_time AS createTime FROM tb_order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_order_item (order_id, sku_id, warehouse_id, quantity, unit_price, amount) VALUES
(#{it.orderId}, #{it.skuId}, #{it.warehouseId}, #{it.quantity}, #{it.unitPrice}, #{it.amount})
